description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to a random enemy 3times, applies [Grievous Wound] 1 stack, and increases Physical DMG taken by [25%->30%] for [10 sec->4sec].

For [10 sec->5sec], increases all allies’ ATK and Physical Evasion [ (added) by 150], and grants self [Breath of Death] for [10 sec->7sec]. [Breath of Death]: Evades all Physical Attacks. [(removed) increases own ATK Spd by 250, DMG dealt to enemies by 20%]

Moves behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG, then consumes all [Grievous Wound] stacks on the target to deal additional Physical DMG per 1 stacks consumed. On Critical Hit, [recovers 2 orbs of Mana->applies Bleed stacks 1] and resets the cooldown of [Slaughter]. Bleed : Deals 5% ATK Physical Damage over Time every 1sec for 15sec, and stacks up to 20 times.

Every [ (added) 10sec], when a Normal Attack lands as a Critical Hit, deals Physical DMG 6 times. Each hit has a [50%->65%] chance to apply [Grievous Wound] stacks 1. [Grievous Wound] : Deals 15% ATK Physical Damage over Time every 1sec for 15sec, stacking up to 5 times.

light.unified: The target is changed to the enemy with the highest ATK.

dark.unified: Increases Attack Speed of all allies by 10% for the duration.

light.unified: The chance for [Rend] to apply [Fatal Wound] stacks is changed to 100%.

description.unified: [Merciless] Dispels all negative effects from self, and recovers Mana by {0} upon Critical Hit.
[Curtain of Darkness] increases duration by 3 sec and boosts DMG dealt to Bosses by {0}%.
[Hack] increases DMG by [50%->{0}%] and [increases own ATK Spd by {0} for 5 sec->applies 1 stack of [Bleed] to the target on Crit].

dark.unified: On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by [300->24%] and Critical Damage by [60%->48%] for 5 sec. This effect can only be triggered once every 5 sec.

description.unified: When using Normal Attacks or [Rend], has a {0}% chance to apply 1 [ (added) additional] stacks of [Fatal Wound] and deal additional Physical Damage per [Fatal Wound] stack.
